description: Style NoteAn all-time favourite accessory, belts form an integral part of dressing - be it to secure your trousers or jeans, or act as a styling detail to jazz up your outfit. This belt from French Connection is set to pump up your style and add zing to your attire.Product DetailsTang clasp with a fixed leather loop to offer a snug Fit and to hold the belt in placeHoles to customise fitBroad base to sit snug on the waistBranding all over the beltMaterial and CareCoated bonded leatherWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustUse a brass polisher to maintain buckle shineUse a leather conditioner to protect the leather
